narrative:
Center (precinct in Carroll County) has 830 registered voters, with 51.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.4 percentage points.
